title: Install and adjust bicycle electronic gear shifters
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install and adjust bicycle electronic gear shifters demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install electronic gear shifting components

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Electronic gear shifter fitting instructions and specifications are sourced and interpreted1.3 Electronic gear shifting unit is identified and selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and procedures are determined to minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Electronic gear shifter fitting instructions and specifications are sourced and interpreted1.3 Electronic gear shifting unit is identified and selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and procedures are determined to minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Electronic gear shifter fitting instructions and specifications are sourced and interpreted1.3 Electronic gear shifting unit is identified and selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and procedures are determined to minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to install electronic gear shifting components

elements.title: Install electronic gear shifting components

pcs.text: Electronic gear shifting components are identified and checked for damage or missing parts according to manufacturer specifications and parts lists2.2 Replacement options and techniques are identified and confirmed 2.3 Electric cables are installed according to fitting instructions, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Electronic front junction control boxes and battery are installed according to component manufacturer specifications2.5 Handle bar brake levers and shifters are fitted and electric cables connected using manufacturer specialist tools2.6 Front and rear derailleurs are fitted and electric cables connected using manufacturer specialist tools2.7 Electric cables are secured according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Electronic gear shifting components are identified and checked for damage or missing parts according to manufacturer specifications and parts lists2.2 Replacement options and techniques are identified and confirmed 2.3 Electric cables are installed according to fitting instructions, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Electronic front junction control boxes and battery are installed according to component manufacturer specifications2.5 Handle bar brake levers and shifters are fitted and electric cables connected using manufacturer specialist tools2.6 Front and rear derailleurs are fitted and electric cables connected using manufacturer specialist tools2.7 Electric cables are secured according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Electronic gear shifting components are identified and checked for damage or missing parts according to manufacturer specifications and parts lists2.2 Replacement options and techniques are identified and confirmed 2.3 Electric cables are installed according to fitting instructions, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Electronic front junction control boxes and battery are installed according to component manufacturer specifications2.5 Handle bar brake levers and shifters are fitted and electric cables connected using manufacturer specialist tools2.6 Front and rear derailleurs are fitted and electric cables connected using manufacturer specialist tools2.7 Electric cables are secured according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Install electronic gear shifting components

elements.title: Adjust electronic rear derailleur gear shifting components

pcs.text: Control device on junction box is activated to allow adjustments to be made 3.2 Chain is positioned on front and rear gear rings according to manufacturer specifications 3.3 Rear derailleur adjustment controls are operated until chain runs smoothly 3.4 Control device on junction box is returned to operational shift mode according to manufacturer specifications3.5 Rear derailleur operation is checked to ensure it operates according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Control device on junction box is activated to allow adjustments to be made 3.2 Chain is positioned on front and rear gear rings according to manufacturer specifications 3.3 Rear derailleur adjustment controls are operated until chain runs smoothly 3.4 Control device on junction box is returned to operational shift mode according to manufacturer specifications3.5 Rear derailleur operation is checked to ensure it operates according to manufacturer specifications?

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and bicycle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
